title: satureja × angosturae
intro: Satureja × angosturae, also known as the Angostura satureja or Angostura satureja rose, is a natural hybrid plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family, derived from the cross between Satureja douglasii and Hyptis suaveolens. The medicinal properties of Satureja × angosturae include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help in soothing digestive issues, relieving pain, and protecting against cell damage. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Satureja × angosturae can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
